title: Light My Fire
why_this_song: Light My Fire by The Doors (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Come on baby, light my fire
Come on baby, light my fire
Try to set the night on fire
The time to hesitate is through
Come on baby, light my fire
Try to set the night on fire, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fire" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fire" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know that it would be untrue
And our love become a funeral pyre
Try to set the night on fire, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Light My Fire" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Light My Fire" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Light My Fire", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Light My Fire", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Light My Fire" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Light My Fire" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Light My Fire" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Light My Fire"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Light My Fire" was released in 1967. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Light My Fire" foi lançada em 1967. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
